issues.detail: Instructions do not explicitly cover error handling or edge cases such as missing tenant identifiers or database connection failures.

scenarios.name: early-stage shared DB + RLS recommendation
scenarios.rationale: Baseline mentions RLS in passing but rarely gives the exact current_setting('app.tenant_id') policy + SET LOCAL middleware pattern or the repository abstraction for later migration that treatment supplies.

scenarios.name: HIPAA database-per-tenant with budget + registry routing
scenarios.rationale: Both pick DB-per-tenant for HIPAA, but treatment also costs the architecture against the $5k budget and prescribes the tenant registry DB plus per-tenant KMS keys and audit logs that the baseline only mentions in generic terms.
